summary:
PROPHETIC VISITATION AND SPIRITUAL IMPARTATION: Brandon recounts a profound spiritual visitation he experienced recently, which he documented at four in the morning to preserve its accuracy. During this encounter, he describes being caught up in the spirit and opening a glowing emerald door that released a massive ball of Holy Ghost fire and green emeralds over him and his wife. In this heavenly vision, Brandon met deceased spiritual leaders, including a woman named Lucy, who instructed him on the necessity of "groaning" out prayers in the spirit, and Brother Kenneth Hagin. Hagin imparted a spiritual seed to Brandon by physically touching his stomach and shared messages he was never permitted to reveal during his earthly life. This impartation involved a mandate for Brandon to teach the Word of Faith, lead deep intercessory prayer, and deliver messages from heaven to earth as the two realms begin to collide. Brandon also saw Jeannie Wilkerson and heard a heavenly choir singing a beautiful, eternal symphony.

END TIMES TIMELINE AND THE URGENT CALL FOR REVIVAL: Throughout the address, Brandon urgently warns that Jesus is coming soon and that the modern church is entirely unprepared for the impending end times. Brother Hagin revealed to Brandon that there is only a short window of time left, specifically mentioning a two-year period of massive revival and an outpouring of the Holy Spirit before the Rapture. Brandon links this timeline to the Shemitah cycle, estimating that the Rapture could align with the 2028-2029 period. He emphasizes that the coming "greater glory" will only be birthed through intense, agonizing travail and spiritual groaning, rather than casual prayer. Brandon insists that believers must humble themselves, strip away their pride, and recognize that any upcoming afflictions are meant to refine the church and produce an eternal weight of glory.

POLITICAL PERSECUTION AND CENSORSHIP: Brandon highlights the fulfillment of a prophecy he previously shared regarding severe religious persecution and the loss of free speech. He points to a recently passed bill in the Canadian House of Commons that could convict individuals of hate speech for reciting certain Bible verses. Brandon uses the metaphor of an olive press to describe this impending pressure, explaining that the tightening restrictions will eventually threaten the 501(c)(3) tax-exempt status of churches in Canada, Europe, and ultimately the United States. However, Brandon prophesies that this intense persecution will awaken a sleeping, lukewarm church, causing believers to unite and sparking a massive global revival reminiscent of old tent meetings.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND TERRORIST THREATS: Brandon discusses several geopolitical threats that he claims God revealed to him, particularly regarding international adversaries. He warns of up to a thousand Iranian sleeper cells and special operations troops that have infiltrated the United States through the northern border via Canada, specifically crossing near Michigan. He connects these threats to potential terrorist attacks around major holidays like Passover and 9/11. Additionally, Brandon discusses Cuba, stating that his previous prophecies about the Castro family engaging in satanic rituals against the US President and a renewed 1960s-style alliance with Russia are coming to pass. He foresees the ultimate removal of the Castros and the rise of a new, conservative leader. Furthermore, he mentions Wall Street analysts preparing for oil to reach 200 dollars a barrel and prays against communist aggression from North Korea and China's attempts to take over Taiwan.

VISIONS OF CORRUPTION AND DOMESTIC CRISES: Brandon shares a bizarre prophetic vision concerning Washington, D.C., where he saw a toad or frog with warts and a flashlight on its nose emerging from the water. This frog, which bore the face of Richard Nixon, was bouncing around and symbolized deep-rooted political corruption and a "Watergate" type of scandal linked to Kentucky and other states. In addition to political corruption, Brandon describes a severe agricultural crisis marked by extreme heat, fires, and devastating droughts across the midwestern and southern United States. He explains that ranchers are being forced to sell off their cattle because the drought has made feeding them too expensive. In response, Brandon forcefully uses his spiritual authority to call for specific low-pressure weather systems and exactly five inches of drought-breaking rain over states like Oklahoma, Missouri, Texas, and Kansas.

PRAYERS FOR NATIONAL LEADERSHIP AND PROTECTION: A significant portion of the broadcast is dedicated to intercessory prayer for national leaders and domestic stability. Brandon prays fervently for President Donald Trump, asking for the protection of his mind from demonic fog, the safety of his children and grandchildren, and the strengthening of his marriage. He also prays for Vice President JD Vance, asking for blessings over his new baby and for the removal of any elitist academic mentality. Brandon actively prays against the outbreak of a civil war in the United States, asking instead for peace and a massive nationwide revival. He also focuses heavily on spiritual protection over churches and synagogues globally during the Holy Week of Passover, Good Friday, and Resurrection Sunday, explicitly referencing past tragedies like the Palm Sunday attack in Nigeria.
rawData: [March 30, 2026]-[The Lord gave me a glimpse of heaven - what I learned about prayer]-[https://youtu.be/M5FxVJVwU2s]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. We're going to go over some things that have happened in the last 48 hours. I had a visitation that was probably one of the top experiences I've ever had. This experience forever changed me, and I don't even really know how to go about it with words. I made a video at four in the morning because I wanted to make sure I documented everything I was shown immediately, so I didn't forget anything or add to or take away from anything. I want to show you the video of everything that the Lord showed me and what I believe is one of the most amazing experiences I've ever had. And that says a lot, but I want to tell you all: Jesus is coming. You need to know this, and the church is not ready. The church is not ready for where we're going and what we're about to experience in these last days. We must come up higher in our prayer life. We must come up higher in our prayer time with Him, seeking Him daily—not just on Sundays or Wednesday nights, but having an intimate relationship with the Lord Jesus Christ. And we must get radical about it. I'm trying to figure out how to even start this, Braden. It's something that is so holy, but I did the best I could to deliver it at four in the morning and make it all on video for you. So I guess we'll go to that. Do you have anything you wanted to show first? Because I don't know if I want to go any other direction other than to just go. Okay, Let's talk about this. I think it's important that you all know that there was an attack, allegedly, in Nigeria. This goes with what the Lord showed us about Passover coming on Wednesday, praying over Passover, Good Friday, and Resurrection Sunday. And so we will continue tonight to pray over that. Let me pray over our livestream and over the video feed and everything. Father, I thank You, Lord, right now, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We take authority over hexes and vexes. I thank You, Lord, that all of it falls to our feet in the name of Jesus. It will not bear fruit on any of us. I thank You, Lord, that we bless those who curse us and we bless those who persecute us. Father, I thank You, Lord, that there's a covering of a hedge around and about me and my mind, and there's clarity as I talk, clarity as I think, and clarity as I do what You called me to do. And we thank you, Lord, that there are angels around and about this house, and we yield to the anointing of the prophetic and the watcher in the name of Jesus. We thank you, Father, that the best is yet to come in Jesus' name. What is this? What do you want to talk about now? When I told you to pray over Canada, I saw great persecution being passed in the Canadian Senate—whatever they have, I don't know. I'm not familiar with Canadian politics, but the Lord specifically said great persecution and the right to freedom of speech is about to be taken away from the Canadian ministers. This will be an olive press that will grow in intensity, and eventually, they'll take away your 501(c)(3) status, like your tax-exempt status. They're going to take away your tax exemption and the ability to say certain things behind your pulpits. Braden's working on a short for this. It was passed today. The Canadian House of Commons has voted in favor of a bill that makes it possible to convict people for reciting certain Bible verses as hate speech. It was passed. This is what the Lord showed me, and He said it's coming, and it happened. I saw that the revival would come forth out of great pressure, like an olive press. The Lord said they will take away your freedom of speech, and I gave the word. Braden's working on that right now so that you can see it. I'm not here making stuff up; it's there, and you can see what the Lord said. I'll find it; you can probably find it. I bet you made a short already, didn't you? So it was passed then. President Trump announced through Truth Social that Cuba's next, which I thought was interesting. He said, 'I don't care if Russia sends them a little bit of oil.' What did I say? The Lord showed us that Cuba and Russia would have 1960s alliances coming back. I saw Russia in the middle giving Cuba military assistance to come against our troops. The Lord said, 'Watch Cuba, watch Cuba.' I can't tell you how many times the Lord has said to watch Cuba, that the Castro family will be like a dog in a corner. I saw him doing satanic practices against our president with a photo. He had it on that altar, and he was doing blood sacrifices with chickens, draining the blood of the chickens in these bowls, and they were doing satanic practices with this witch doctor. He was dancing in a corner with horns on his head, and it was like deer horns wrapped around it. He was doing this, and they were trying to come against our President in his mind. And the Lord said, "Pray for President Trump's mind." You remember, I've told you all this. Well, President Trump is saying that Cuba's next. What did I tell you all? The Lord said, "Cuba's next, Cuba's next." So President Trump is saying exactly what the Lord said now. And so I think that's interesting because the Lord said, "I'm going to liberate the people, and I'm going to eliminate the Castro family bloodline from being a leader and a dictator over this nation. And I will bring great prosperity and blessing over this nation." And I saw—it looked amazing for where they have been—and I saw Rubio rising up and helping this. And then it was Claudia next; after that, Claudia would be removed. After that, I saw Claudia and her days would be numbered. And then I saw a new man, like an Antonio Banderas kind of man who looked like a model, come up, and he was conservative. And the Lord said, "The church has to contend for this over Mexico." And I saw a new leader rising up that looked like a GQ model. He looked very proper; he was very poised in what he said, and the people were happy with him. And so I saw this. Now, how long is it until this all comes about? I don't know; I see in part here. But as President Trump said, "Do you have the show on this?" "Yeah." "Does he say it actually?" "Yeah." "Okay, let's play it." "You can tell me, Daddy, I have it up. I'm waiting on you." "Wait until you get what you wanted to show done tonight so we can go on. It is a mess." "So they can hear it louder than you. Okay? It's good if they can hear it." "I'm good. I don't need to hear it, son." "Yeah, they're recording. Okay. Go ahead to Cuba." "Yeah. Cuba is going to be next. Cuba is going to be... it is a mess. It's a failing country. They're going to be next within a short period of time. It's going to fail. And we will be there to help it out. We'll be there to help our great Cuban Americans out who were thrown out of Cuba. In many cases, their family members were mutilated and killed by Castro. No, Cuba is going to be next. What are you considering? Yeah. And then, you start watching right now. She's going to let." He was dancing in a corner with horns on his head, and it was like deer horns wrapped around it. He was doing this, and they were trying to come against our President in his mind. And the Lord said, "Pray for President Trump's mind." You remember, I've told you all this. We'll be there to help our great Cuban Americans out who were thrown out of Cuba. In many cases, their family members were mutilated and killed by Castro. No, Cuba is going to be next. What are you considering? Yeah. And then, you start watching right now. She's going to let." The Lord said they would be successful, but I pray that we can stop it. That is the man, just like the Lord said. I think it's interesting, don't you? Here he is saying it again. I want you to see the accuracy of what the Lord is trying to say. 'President Trump is making America great again. I intend to make Iran great again.' Now we have sleeper cells—up to a thousand Iranian sleeper cells. Agents are embedded in the Canadian government. Remember, I told you the Lord said to keep praying over Canada concerning Passover. First I saw Toronto, then I saw all the way to British Columbia. I saw major terrorist attacks in the days ahead concerning Easter and going into Rosh Hashanah, 9/11, and through the summer months. I told you about the power plants. I can go over things repeatedly, but it will draw this out. You must see what the Lord said recently. Now we see the New York Post confirming a thousand Iranian sleeper cells, sleeper agents in America. But I said they come from Canada. I can even tell you where they come across, by Michigan. Even with this last one, I said they came from Canada. They are special ops troops. They didn't come from the southern border; they came from the northern border. I said they came by Michigan. I even showed you the bridge where they crossed. Does anybody remember that? I told you how they made it across. There are videos, and I will show you. I told you exactly where I saw it. I saw this in the still of the night, and they went through the water in some places. When we prayed it through, it was very detailed. I even told you what they were wearing. Now they say there are a thousand of them. Breaking: U.S. officials and Wall Street analysts are now reportedly preparing for the possibility of $200 a barrel for oil. It is pretty interesting; the Lord showed us. In my opinion, this is not financial advice. The Lord said they would be successful, but I pray that we can stop it. It is pretty interesting; the Lord showed us. In my opinion, this is not financial advice. And he said, 'I used the female Brandon for a purpose because they have a womb.' And I saw a spiritual womb where these ladies held these seeds that have been around these generals. They were an A to B to C; they were the bridge. And the Lord said, 'I'm allowing them to hold this because they are the holders, like a marsupial.' And I saw them holding it to impart when the time was right. As I was going to see Mark Jenkins tonight, I also knew there were things that you need here. So I went to Pastor Chip's church—because that's where we go—and she was teaching there. She called up and said, 'I feel that I'm supposed to lay hands on people.' So the Lord said, 'Get up there.' She laid hands on me, and I felt it hit me in the stomach. I saw an acorn that looked like a seed—it looked like some kind of fruit seed. I didn't know what it was, but it went inside of me when she touched me and I felt it just go poof, like it just dropped heavy. I thought, 'I wonder what that was.' I went home and the Lord said to me, 'Those were things from Brother Hagin.' There were things there that she was holding. To make a long story short, I went home and started taking communion with my kids, like we always do, just praying. We started praying and taking communion, and all of a sudden I was caught up in the spirit and saw a door. This door was a beautiful door that was glowing with a green emerald color; it was a green fire. And the Lord said, 'Open the door.' So I'm traveling and interceding, and I said, 'Lord, help me to open this door.' I get to the door and I open it. As I open the door, a massive ball of fire was on the other side. As I opened it, it flowed out over me and the Holy Ghost fire hit me on my couch as we were praying and interceding. I could see it, and green emeralds started raining down on me and my wife. The Lord said, 'There is no beginning and there is no end to this.' The green was flowing all over me, looking like green money, and it was flowing down and down. And he said, 'I used the female Brandon for a purpose because they have a womb.' And I saw a spiritual womb where these ladies held these seeds that have been around these generals. They were an A to B to C; they were the bridge. And the Lord said, 'I'm allowing them to hold this because they are the holders, like a marsupial.' And I saw them holding it to impart when the time was right. As I was going to see Mark Jenkins tonight, I also knew there were things that you need here. So I went to Pastor Chip's church—because that's where we go—and she was teaching there. She called up and said, 'I feel that I'm supposed to lay hands on people.' So the Lord said, 'Get up there.' She laid hands on me, and I felt it hit me in the stomach. I saw an acorn that looked like a seed—it looked like some kind of fruit seed. I didn't know what it was, but it went inside of me when she touched me and I felt it just go poof, like it just dropped heavy. I thought, 'I wonder what that was.' I went home and the Lord said to me, 'Those were things from Brother Hagin.' There were things there that she was holding. To make a long story short, I went home and started taking communion with my kids, like we always do, just praying. We started praying and taking communion, and all of a sudden I was caught up in the spirit and saw a door. This door was a beautiful door that was glowing with a green emerald color; it was a green fire. And the Lord said, 'Open the door.' So I'm traveling and interceding, and I said, 'Lord, help me to open this door.' I get to the door and I open it. As I open the door, a massive ball of fire was on the other side. As I opened it, it flowed out over me and the Holy Ghost fire hit me on my couch as we were praying and interceding. I could see it, and green emeralds started raining down on me and my wife. The Lord said, 'There is no beginning and there is no end to this.' The green was flowing all over me, looking like green money, and it was flowing down and down. She said, 'It's your turn to groan it out. I've been groaning it out. Now it's your turn.' And she touched me—still groaning it out in the earth—and boom, she hit my stomach. I tell you, I felt like I was going to burn up with fire. She touched me in heaven. I'm seeing this in the spirit; I felt like I was translated there. I know I was still here in my body because I was praying all this out. My son recorded all of it, but I'm there in the spirit. She touched my stomach and said, 'Now it's your turn. Groan it out.' And she touched me, and I could feel fire, and I just started going, 'Whoo!' I was just groaning; it was a Holy Ghost fire groaning, but it sounded like a cow, like a moo. It was a deep groaning. She was standing there, grinning at me with a big smile on her face. And all of a sudden, Brother Hagin came, and Brother Hagin was walking. In front of her house were the gold streets. There were beautiful, transparent gold streets. There was a four-way stop in front of her house. I could see a sign that was a street name with Hebrew writing. It was beautiful, on a green sign like we have on Earth, but not in English, with Hebrew. I didn't know what it said, but I could see it was a four-way stop, but not a stop sign, just street names. It said what street she lived on. In front of her house were beautiful flowers. She lived in a Victorian home; it looked like a plantation home, like in Mississippi or Alabama, with beautiful pillars. On the front was a huge wraparound porch with a brown rail that went all the way around where you would put your arms. Everything was beautiful white, but it was all like lattice. You know how you have those carved-out wood structures on old Victorian homes. But there were grains; you could see the grain of the wood, but there was blue on some of them, and there were beautiful colors on this shiny, lacquer-looking banister that went all the way around the porch. The gold street went all the way, and her porch went around. Her house was huge and two stories. The windows were massive picture windows across the front of her home. There were two of them and then her front door—double front doors with two wreaths. They were beautiful greenery wreaths that looked like something you would get for Easter. Beautiful colors, beautiful greens. On her front door, which had two huge columns that went up the steps to her house, I could see rocking chairs. It was the same rocking chair she used with the quilt when she was sitting there praying with Rachel for Tillar and Jeane Wilkerson, Brother Halvorsen, and the other lady—I don't know who it was. She was using that same rocking chair, but she had it on her front porch with ferns. They were beautiful ferns and things hanging down. As I was looking at her house, I tried to focus on it, but I had to focus on what she was saying. It was beautiful. The oak tree I saw her sitting by was on the corner of her house. She has massive, beautiful oak trees in her front yard. All of a sudden, she was talking to me about intercessory prayer and telling me it has to be groaned out in the spirit. Brother Kenneth Hagin walked up beside her and said, 'I have a message from the Lord to give you.' He looked young; he didn't look old. I hardly recognized him because, although his voice sounded the same, his face didn't look the same to me. He didn't look skinny like a beanpole; he still had some weight and looked thick, but he didn't look obese. As he walked up, he said to me, 'There are things I was never allowed to say on the earth that I carried, and as of tonight, you receive part of that seed. There are things I was never allowed to say, visitations from the Lord I was never allowed to tell. It's time now to birth this in the earth, to grow this forth in the earth, for it wasn't my time when I received it. But it's your turn now. Take the Word of Faith and teach the people the Word of Faith, just like I did. Teach them prayer. You have an assignment. You must finish strong.' He said there would be things I would groan out in the spirit for the impartation of things he had. 'You will now receive and give this to the earth.' For it was in my time when I had it; it's your time. And he said, 'Birth it, birth it, praying it in, birth it out in prayer and travail.' And so when Brother Hagin was standing there, he said that over the last two years of the church before the Rapture, this is what you're about to see. And that's when he touched me; he imparted it. He imparted it like a Lucy, and he said, 'This is what I was not allowed to talk about. This is the last two years before the Rapture.' He said, 'This is what you're about to see: the end-time glory, and it must be birthed out. This is something I didn't talk about.' And he said, 'I saw a veil.' It looked like a veil—you know, like when you're seeing something that has a film in front of it—it looked like it was being blocked out where you couldn't see it. You couldn't make out what it was because it wasn't time. But he said over this time frame, you'll see this, and it's time now; it's time now. You are birthing this now. And I saw it, and it was a veil. As it was about the end times, he said, 'This will happen over the two years before the coming of the Lord.' And as he said all that he was supposed to say from the Lord, I felt the Holy Ghost and fire hit me. He just turned around and walked away. He didn't say anything else; he didn't say goodbye or anything, he just turned around and walked away. He walked down the same golden path, but he didn't say anything else to me. He was done, and he just turned around and walked away. He had his hands in front of him like this, and he was twiddling his fingers on his chest. And he said, 'I have a word from the Lord for you.' But he was twiddling his fingers just like this. It was kind of strange, but that's what I saw him doing; he was twiddling his fingers and he turned around and walked away. He didn't say anything else to me. As I was standing there, Jeannie Wilkerson came up. She never said anything to me; she was just grinning at me and smiled real big. Jeannie had big puffy hair, big hair. She had a bell, beautiful 1900s-like blouse on that had a ruffled collar that buttoned down, with beautiful sleeves that buttoned. They were puffy sleeves. And she just sat there and looked at me, but I could see she looked young, even though she had old people's clothes on. She had old people's clothes on, like old clothes, and she smiled at me. I was being sucked out and was coming back into my natural state out of the spirit. I said, "Oh no, wait." I could hear the angel choir singing above Lucy's house, and I could hear, "Holy, holy, holy is the Lord, holy, holy, holy, holy, holy, holy." They sounded like living water; they sounded like echoes of living water. It sounded to me like a sound that never ended and never began. It was a flow. I don't know how else to describe it. It sounded like a symphony. It was the most beautiful noise; I could hear it in the atmosphere. It was gorgeous, the way they all sounded. But it wasn't just one voice; it was many voices, all singing through the atmosphere that sounded like a symphony. It was gorgeous. I could see it as I was getting pulled out. Wanting to hear more about prayer from Lucy, I stopped and asked, "Is there anything else? Is there anything else you want to say?" She said, "Tell my sister I'm more alive than I've ever been and tell her that I will see her soon. Tell her I said hi." As I was being sucked out, she turned her back to me and started walking towards her porch. I heard, "Finish strong, finish strong. You must finish strong." I was back in my heart. There are really no words; all I can tell you is heaven is so real, and it is the most beautiful thing I've ever seen in my life. Again, the Lord allowed me to see on the other side. But He said, "You're going to start to see a lot and give messages from heaven to earth. Heaven and earth are colliding and you're about to give messages from heaven to earth because there are things that need to be said." As heaven and earth collide, there are things that need to be said. There are impartations that need to happen. I saw my doorway. He said, "This is your doorway. This is your portal, and you'll start to use this a lot." I don't know what that means, if "a lot" is a lot—it's been over a year since the last one—but I'm so grateful. At the same time, I know it's a lot of responsibility. I saw all the different tribes and different stones. They were on a chart: green sapphire, red, and pinks. They looked like purple stones. And He said, "This is the 12 tribes of Israel." I saw the 12 tribes, and He showed me there would be a similarity to end-time mantles and end-time calls, different types of ministries walking in the ever-glorious outpouring that would represent different stones.
